text: INFRATEC maintains an Approved Supplier List with criteria for selection, evaluation, and re-evaluation. Purchase orders state requirements. High-risk services require verification before use. Supplier performance is reviewed annually and after significant issues. Nonconformities are recorded and acted upon.
title: QMS-P-012.txt

text: INFRATEC Document Control: All procedures and forms are controlled documents. Version control via unique ID, revision, and effective date. Changes require QA approval; superseded copies removed. Records retained per retention schedule.
title: QMS-P-008.txt
